sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ الشَّخْصِيَّةُ هِيَ الْخُطْوَةُ الْأُولَى لِلْوِقَايَةِ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Lična higijena je prvi korak u prevenciji bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Personal hygiene is the first step in preventing diseases.

sentences.arabic: نَغْسِلُ أَيْدِيَنَا دَائِمًا قَبْلَ تَنَاوُلِ الْوَجَبَاتِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translationEn: We always wash our hands before eating meals.

sentences.arabic: كَذَلِكَ نَسْتَخْدِمُ الصَّابُونَ لِقَتْلِ الْجَرَاثِيمِ وَالْمَيْكُرُوبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Također koristimo sapun kako bismo ubili klice i mikrobe.
sentences.translationEn: We also use soap to kill germs and microbes.
